<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''United States of America''' ('''[USA]''') (~July - early Fall in 2004) was a North American only clan playing only [[Lamda Bunker]] [[Rifles]] setting. Clan developed from [[Ghost Reapers]].

== Members ==
=== Leader ===
* Halo

=== Co-Leader ===
* NemesIs

=== Normal members ===
* Dr. Pepper
* Gohan/Gigolo
* Naphtali
* Playa187
* Screamer

== Clan Wars ==
=== Won ===
* UT (2:0)

=== Lost ===
* TbfC.ee (0:1)

=== Tied ===
N/A

== See also ==
* [[Ghost Reapers]]

== External links ==
* [http://usaclan.freewebspace.com United States of America home page]
* [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=16237 United States of America GU thread]

[[Category:Clans]]
[[Category:Retired clans]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721164436/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/United_States_of_America -->
